mergekit.note: MergeKit requires identical architecture. GPT-2 and DialoGPT share architecture, but MergeKit uses weight-space methods (TIES/DARE/SLERP) designed for task-vector merging, not base-model merging. These methods produce gibberish on base models (verified in prior tests).
